thought: Blend the scraped combat reference into the locked first-frame store_ui scene by preserving @0001.png composition exactly: top half remains a paused side-view dungeon battle with the hero on the left and gold-armored enemy on the right, bottom half remains the equipment management panel. Because the current scene state is idle and the image type is store_ui, the timeline starts with a user tap on the highlighted equipment card rather than forcing immediate battle. Then I borrow the reference video's timing, fixed portrait camera, dense impact rhythm, and orange-yellow arcade hit feedback as a contained UI-driven preview/confirmation effect layered over the existing battlefield area, without changing character positions or turning the whole screen into free combat. Motion stays short, compact, and readable: subtle Live2D reactions, slight emphasis pulses, quick impact flashes, stacked damage-style numbers, then confirmation and currency deduction. I selected only essential assets under the 9-asset limit and added strict stability constraints for face, anatomy, and UI readability.
prompt_en: First Frame: @0001.png. Reference Video: @trimmed_best_ref_1774788139.mp4. Motion Style Reference: adopt the reference video's fixed portrait gameplay camera, compact side-view combat rhythm, explosive orange-yellow impact timing, stacked floating numbers, and stable centered readability, while strictly continuing the exact store_ui state from the first frame with no composition change. Cute medieval fantasy, stylized mobile ARPG, vertical screen side-scrolling battle layout, dark cartoon dungeon UI, clean combat readability, 4K ultra HD, cinematic texture, rich details, no jitter, stable face without deformation, clear facial features, normal anatomical structure, natural proportions, non-stiff movement. [00s-02s] (Background Layer) Keep the dungeon battle backdrop in the upper-middle frozen in the same side-on 2D gameplay view, no camera travel, only faint ambient torch flicker. (Character/Action Layer) Use @hero_live2d_idle_react_sheet_204512.png for a subtle idle bounce from the small white-haired hero on the left and @enemy_idle_react_sheet_204602.png for a minimal breathing reaction from the gold-armored enemy on the right, both staying in their original positions. (UI Layer) In the lower equipment panel, the large left weapon card is tapped using @equipment_card_select_sheet_204308.png; its border glows warm gold, the card lifts slightly forward, nearby equipment cards dim, and a crisp selection ring expands from the tap point. [02s-04s] (UI Layer) Slide in @upgrade_confirm_popup_204351.png from the bottom center above the existing panel, showing equip or upgrade confirmation, resource cost, and a highlighted confirm button; preserve the bottom UI anchor and vertical split layout. (Character/Action Layer) The hero in the top battle strip gives a tiny anticipatory Live2D nod as if linked to the equipment choice, while the enemy remains idle. (VFX Layer) Add soft gold particles flowing upward from the selected card toward the upper battle zone, establishing the pending power transfer. [04s-06s] (VFX Layer) On confirm, trigger a short combat-style burst in the upper battlefield using @skill_vfx_sequence_mainattack_183425.png, strictly inspired by @trimmed_best_ref_1774788139.mp4 timing: a compact orange-yellow explosion bloom appears near center-right between hero and enemy, with fast layered hit sparks and radial flash, but no major displacement. (UI Layer) Use @buff_damage_ui_pack_204641.png to spawn dense readable floating numbers and buff text over the enemy area, like a stat-preview damage pulse rather than full combat takeover. (Character/Action Layer) The enemy performs a tiny recoil snap in place, head and shoulders jolting back slightly, then returns, while the hero holds a confident idle pose. [06s-08s] (UI Layer) Play @currency_deduct_success_ui_sheet_204434.png in the lower center: currency count decreases smoothly, a green success tick or upgraded stat arrow appears, and the selected item level or power value increments with a bright gold pulse. (VFX Layer) Gold sparkles drip back down from the battlefield preview into the item card, visually closing the upgrade loop. (Character/Action Layer) Hero gives a brief satisfied Live2D reaction, enemy settles back to idle. [08s-10s] (Background Layer) Return to the exact calm management state from the first frame, same composition and anchors. (UI Layer) The pop-up retracts, the upgraded card remains highlighted with a stronger frame glow, minor buff icon shimmer persists, all other UI remains sharp and readable. (VFX Layer) Residual tiny embers and soft gold particles dissipate cleanly. Overall motion should mimic the reference video's punchy timing and dense feedback in a restrained UI-linked way, preserving the original store screen logic and stable portrait layout.
prompt_zh: > 首帧锁定: @0001.png。参考视频: @trimmed_best_ref_1774788139.mp4。动作风格参考: 借用参考视频中固定竖屏实机镜头、紧凑横版战斗节奏、橙黄色爆裂命中帧、密集飘字与稳定可读的反馈方式，但必须严格延续首帧的 store_ui 管理界面逻辑，不改变构图，不把场景改成完全战斗。Q萌中世纪奇幻，手游ARPG风格，竖屏横版卷轴战斗布局，暗色卡通地牢UI，清晰爽快易读，4K ultra HD，cinematic texture，rich details，no jitter，stable face without deformation，clear facial features，normal anatomical structure，natural proportions，non-stiff movement。[00s-02s] （背景层）保持上半部地牢战斗背景与首帧完全一致，侧视2D构图不移动镜头，只保留极轻微火光环境闪烁。（角色/动作层）使用 @hero_live2d_idle_react_sheet_204512.png 让左侧白发主角做轻微待机呼吸和小幅弹动，使用 @enemy_idle_react_sheet_204602.png 让右侧金甲敌人做极轻微待机起伏，双方位置绝对不变。（UI层）下半部装备面板中，用 @equipment_card_select_sheet_204308.png 表现左侧大武器卡被点击：卡牌边框亮起暖金描边，卡面轻微前浮，周围其他装备卡轻微压暗，点击处扩散一圈清晰选择光环。[02s-04s] （UI层）用 @upgrade_confirm_popup_204351.png 从底部中央滑出确认弹窗，显示装备/强化确认、资源消耗和高亮确认按钮，严格保持底部UI锚点和上下分区结构不变。（角色/动作层）上半部战斗区域内主角做一个很轻的Live2D点头呼应，敌人仍保持待机。（特效层）从被选中的装备卡向上半战场区域飘出柔和金色粒子流，形成“装备强化即将生效”的能量联系。[04s-06s] （特效层）点击确认后，在上半战场中使用 @skill_vfx_sequence_mainattack_183425.png 触发一次短促的战斗预览爆发，严格参考 @trimmed_best_ref_1774788139.mp4 的命中节奏：在主角与敌人之间偏右位置出现紧凑的橙黄爆炸闪光、快速叠层火花和放射冲击亮斑，但不要产生大位移。（UI层）使用 @buff_damage_ui_pack_204641.png 在敌人上方生成密集但清晰可读的伤害数字和增益文字，更像强化后的数值预览反馈，而不是彻底进入真实战斗。（角色/动作层）敌人仅做轻微受击后仰，头肩短促一震后回位，主角保持自信待机姿态。[06s-08s] （UI层）用 @currency_deduct_success_ui_sheet_204434.png 在下方中央播放资源扣除成功反馈：货币数字平滑减少，出现绿色成功勾选或强化箭头，被选中装备的等级/战力数字向上跳变并伴随亮金脉冲。（特效层）少量金色碎光从上方战场预览区回流到装备卡中，形成完整强化闭环。（角色/动作层）主角做一个短促满意反应，敌人恢复待机。[08s-10s] （背景层）回到与首帧完全一致的平静管理状态，构图、锚点、上下布局都不改变。（UI层）弹窗收回，强化后的装备卡保留更强的高亮边框和轻微流光，少量buff图标微闪，其余UI保持锐利清晰可读。（特效层）残留的小火星和柔和金粒子自然消散。整体节奏要像参考视频那样利落、爽快、反馈密集，但必须以UI驱动的方式呈现，严格服从首帧的商店/装备管理逻辑与稳定竖屏布局。
